heading: Certification of train conductors
label: 20163 Certification of train conductors
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of the Rail Safety Improvement Act of 2008, referred to in subsec. (a), is the date of enactment of div. A of , which was approved .Pub. L. 110–432Oct. 16, 2008

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: a .—Regulations
children.text: Not later than 18 months after the date of enactment of the Rail Safety Improvement Act of 2008, the Secretary of Transportation shall prescribe regulations to establish a program requiring the certification of train conductors. In prescribing such regulations, the Secretary shall require that train conductors be trained, in accordance with the training standards developed pursuant to section 20162.

children.heading: .—Program Requirements
children.label: b .—Program Requirements
children.text: In developing the regulations required by subsection (a), the Secretary may consider the requirements of section 20135(b) through (e).
